query:
-- Breakdown by service type and supplier
SELECT serviceType, supplierName, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
GROUP BY serviceType, supplierName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
